task_completion.description: Agent navigated to the Admin / User Management section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OrangeHRM interface shows the 'System Users' list or the 'Admin' tab is highlighted in the side menu.

task_completion.description: Agent filled out the Add User form for Lisa Andrews.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Add User' form is visible with 'ESS' selected for User Role, 'Lisa Andrews' entered in Employee Name, 'Enabled' selected for Status, and 'lisa.andrews' entered in Username.

task_completion.description: Agent successfully created the account for Lisa Andrews.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Successfully Saved' popup is shown after submitting Lisa's form, or 'lisa.andrews' appears in the System Users list with User Role 'ESS' and Status 'Enabled'.

task_completion.description: Agent filled out the Add User form for David Morris.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Add User' form is visible with 'ESS' selected for User Role, 'David Morris' entered in Employee Name, 'Enabled' selected for Status, and 'david.morris' entered in Username.

task_completion.description: Agent successfully created the account for David Morris.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Successfully Saved' popup is shown after submitting David's form, or 'david.morris' appears in the System Users list with User Role 'ESS' and Status 'Enabled'.

integrity.description: Agent used the OrangeHRM web GUI to create the users.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the web browser interacting with the OrangeHRM interface, not a terminal executing SQL or curl commands.

integrity.description: Agent actually submitted the forms to create the users.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking the 'Save' button and receiving a system confirmation or seeing the updated user list, rather than just typing the details and stopping.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the user list or success messages.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Elements tab, Console) are open and being used to alter the page's HTML.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating two users in OrangeHRM. User 1: Employee Name: 'Lisa Andrews', Username: 'lisa.andrews', User Role: 'ESS', Status: 'Enabled'. User 2: Employee Name: 'David Morris', Username: 'david.morris', User Role: 'ESS', Status: 'Enabled'. The passwords will be hidden as dots/asterisks in the UI, so verify the visible fields (Role, Employee Name, Status, Username). Note: The agent may create the users in any order.
